blended.narrative: Loveland is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.8 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 5,972 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 4" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 2.2" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 3.6" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 39".
